turns.text: Find oil-soluble Y and Gd carboxylates for the liquid, cosmetics-compliant.
Found 4 candidates. Y 2-ethylhexanoate and Gd neodecanoate are the cleanest fits — both catalog-available, no cosmetics restriction.

trail.text: Searched supplier catalogs for oil-soluble Y / Gd carboxylates
Checked EU Cosmetics Annex II / III for Y and Gd — no entry
Cross-checked SVHC candidate list — not listed
Comparing metal loading and solvent carriers…
